docs.title: Block Metadata
positives: The `name` field documentation correctly describes the required `blockName/identifier` format.
The `version` field description accurately matches the semver expectation in the source.
The `editorScript` field documentation correctly covers the `WPDefinedAsset` type variants.

docs.title: Block Registration

evidence.docSays: The `transforms` property accepts a `WPBlockTypeTransforms` object with `from` and `to` arrays.
evidence.codeSays: In `packages/blocks/src/api/registration.js`, `transforms` is typed as `Object | undefined` with no enforced shape.

issues.suggestion: Update the documentation to note that while `from` and `to` arrays are conventional, the runtime performs no structural validation of the `transforms` object.

evidence.docSays: The `category` field defaults to `null` when not specified.
evidence.codeSays: In `packages/blocks/src/store/reducer.js`, unset category resolves to `undefined`, not `null`.

issues.suggestion: Replace 'defaults to `null`' with 'defaults to `undefined`' to match the runtime behaviour.

evidence.docSays: The `icon` field is required for all registered blocks.
evidence.codeSays: In `packages/blocks/src/api/registration.js`, `icon` is optional and falls back to a generic puzzle-piece icon when absent.

issues.suggestion: Mark `icon` as optional in the documentation and mention the fallback icon behaviour.

positives: The `apiVersion` field documentation correctly lists `2` as the current recommended value.

evidence.docSays: Use `source: 'meta'` to store attribute values in post meta.
evidence.codeSays: In `packages/blocks/src/api/parser/get-block-attributes.js`, the `meta` source was removed and throws a deprecation warning since Gutenberg 12.8; the attribute is silently ignored at runtime.

issues.suggestion: Remove the `source: 'meta'` example and replace it with the recommended approach of using `useEntityProp` with a client-side attribute.

evidence.docSays: The `query` source accepts an object whose keys map to child-attribute definitions with a `selector` and `source`.
evidence.codeSays: In `packages/blocks/src/api/parser/get-block-attributes.js`, `query` source iterates `attributeSchema.query` as an array, not a plain object — a plain object will silently produce no results.

issues.suggestion: Correct the documentation: `query` must be an array of attribute descriptor objects, not a keyed object map.

evidence.docSays: Example uses `{ type: 'string', source: 'attribute', selector: 'img', attribute: 'src' }` to read an image URL.
evidence.codeSays: In `packages/blocks/src/api/parser/get-block-attributes.js`, attribute source lookup requires a non-empty `selector`; when the selector matches nothing, the attribute resolves to `undefined`, not an empty string as the docs imply.

issues.suggestion: Add a note clarifying that if the selector matches no element the returned value is `undefined`, not `''`.

docs.title: Block Supports

evidence.docSays: Set `supports.typography.fontStyle` to `true` to enable the font-style control in the editor toolbar.
evidence.codeSays: In `packages/block-editor/src/hooks/typography.js`, the registered support key is `__experimentalFontStyle`, not `fontStyle`; the stable key does not exist in the current codebase.

issues.suggestion: Replace `supports.typography.fontStyle` with `supports.typography.__experimentalFontStyle` and note its experimental status.

evidence.codeSays: In `packages/block-editor/src/hooks/align.js`, `supports.align` resolves to `undefined` when absent; it is coerced to falsy but the documented default of `false` is misleading.

issues.suggestion: Change 'defaults to `false`' to 'defaults to `undefined` (treated as disabled)' for accuracy.

positives: The `supports.color.background` documentation correctly describes the opt-in behaviour and default value of `true`.
diagnostics: The mapping file references `packages/block-editor/src/hooks/color.js` which was not found in the cloned repo at ref `trunk`; skipped.
